info.title: Unsplash API
info.description: Access the largest open collection of high-quality photos. The Unsplash API allows you to search, browse, and download free photos, manage collections, and access user profiles.

get.description: Get a single page from the editorial feed.
Retrieve a single photo with full details.

put.description: Update a photo's metadata (requires write_photos scope).

get.description: Retrieve one or more random photos with optional filters.

parameters.name: collections
parameters.description: Comma-separated collection IDs to narrow selection.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Limit to photos matching a search term.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of photos to return (1-30). Returns array when set.

get.description: Track a photo download event. Must be called when downloading a photo per API guidelines.
Get total Unsplash stats (downloads, views, etc).

bearerAuth.description: OAuth2 bearer token for authenticated user actions.
